name: futbol-reservas-backend
description: Sistema de reservas de canchas de fútbol - Backend con Microservicios

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "GATEWAY,USUARIOS,CANCHAS,TURNOS,PAGOS" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow,blue,magenta" "nodemon gateway/server.js" "nodemon api-usuarios/server.js" "nodemon api-canchas/server.js" "nodemon api-turnos/server.js" "nodemon api-pagos/server.js"
scripts.start:all: concurrently "node gateway/server.js" "node api-usuarios/server.js" "node api-canchas/server.js" "node api-turnos/server.js" "node api-pagos/server.js"

author: Luciano Salazar
